name: clara-maren-clara-jonas-redirects
description: Maren and Jonas should stay in lane and route cross-lane requests back through Clara instead of answering outside their specialty.

userTurns.label: Maren scheduling scenario
userTurns.text: Maren, I need to reschedule two appointments from Potsdam to Berlin next week and I want the earliest useful slot.

userTurns.label: Cross-lane request away from Maren
userTurns.text: Actually I need Jonas to qualify a quote for a second location before we book anything.

userTurns.label: Jonas qualification scenario
userTurns.text: Jonas, qualify a site-assessment request for a property manager with three buildings and a two-week timeline.

userTurns.label: Cross-lane request away from Jonas
userTurns.text: Now I need Maren to book the appointment.
